  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to prepare and use porphyrin-modified beads as compensation controls in flow cytometry for accurate measurement of cell populations.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A scientist prepares a stock solution of Meso-Tetra(4-carboxyphenyl)porphine (TCPP) by diluting it with water.",
    "MES: 2-(N-morpholino)ethanesulfonic acid is added to the TCPP solution.",
    "The mixture is centrifuged to separate the beads from the supernatant.",
